title: Identity Credential
description: Verifiable credential attesting basic identity attributes of a person, anchored to a government-issued document.

name.description: Full legal name of the person.

nationality.description: Nationality, recommended as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. "IN", "US").

documentNumber.description: Identifier of the underlying government-issued document (passport, national ID, etc.).
